overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game featuring a samurai character running through a misty rural Japanese landscape at night. The character traverses a dirt path lined with stone lanterns, passes a dilapidated wooden hut, and crosses a wooden bridge over rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through misty grassland with stone lanterns

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the path
passing a lit stone lantern on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: samurai character running steadily along the dirt path through the misty landscape, passing traditional stone lanterns

entered.detail: traditional stone lantern with flame lighting the right side of the path
simple wooden fence posts lining the right side of the trail
winding dirt trail cutting through tall grass
dilapidated wooden structure with weathered walls and tiled roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a samurai character running along a dirt path at night. Stone lanterns with warm flames line the route, and a dilapidated wooden hut becomes visible in the distance on the left. The atmosphere is misty and dark, with limited visibility beyond the immediate path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland past the wooden hut

events.description: wooden hut passes by on the left and exits the field of view
wooden bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead, marking the next destination

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through open grassland, navigating slight curves in the path toward the distant bridge

entered.detail: sparse dead trees and bushes dotting the open field
wooden bridge structure with railings visible in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wooden hut, the character runs through more open grassland with sparse vegetation. The wooden fence recedes into the distance on the right, and a wooden bridge becomes visible ahead in the mist. The terrain is uneven with scattered rocks and bare trees.

events.description: character steps onto the wooden bridge, transitioning from dirt to wooden planks
slight turn to the right while crossing the bridge

agents.ego_description: running across the wooden bridge, passing stone lanterns at the entrance and continuing over the span

entered.detail: wooden railings along the left side of the bridge
wooden railings along the right side of the bridge
rocky ground and boulders visible below the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and steps onto a wooden bridge flanked by stone lanterns. The enclosed bridge structure features wooden railings on both sides, with rocky terrain visible below. The camera follows closely as the character runs across the wooden planks, navigating a slight curve in the bridge's path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty rural landscape at night that transitions from a narrow lantern-lit path to an open bridge crossing. It begins by following a samurai running along a dirt path lined with warm stone lanterns, moving toward a dilapidated wooden hut visible through the dark haze. As the character passes the hut, the scene opens into a stretch of uneven grassland with sparse vegetation and a receding wooden fence, while a bridge emerges from the mist ahead. The camera then follows the character as they step onto the wooden planks of the bridge, navigating a slight curve between wooden railings and stone lanterns. Finally, the movement concludes as the character crosses the structure over a rocky terrain below.
